metadata.title: Home Remittance | Easy Remit | Tracker | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Easy Remit is a state-of-the-art Home Remittance service that allows millions of non-resident Pakistanis to send money to their loved ones living in Pakistan in a simple, easy and convenient manner.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو The Fast & Reliable Way to Send Money Home If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Meezan Easy Remit Send Money Home Meezan Easy Remit is a state-of-the-art Home Remittance service that allows millions of non-resident Pakistanis to send money to their loved ones living in Pakistan in a simple, easy and convenient manner. Thereafter, beneficiaries in Pakistan can immediately collect the money sent from abroad from Meezan Bank’s nationwide network of branches located across the country. Terms & Conditions: This campaign is valid on all foreign remittances (Cash over the Counter) received from Meezan Bank branches. It is applicable for the period of one month starting from 18th August, 2017 till 16th September, 2017. Three smart phones and one bumper prize of motorbike will be given every week. All winners will be selected via weekly lucky draws. Employees of Meezan Bank and the agent companies are not eligible for the contest. Decision of Meezan Bank will be final and cannot be challenged in any way. SBP Remittance Survey 2026 Survey Link List of Correspondents Australia Belgium Europe Japan Kuwait Oman Qatar KSA South Africa UAE United Kingdom World Wide Aussie Forex Money Travels PTY Sydney Forex J Forex Money Transfer Home Send National Exchange Company S.R.L Japan Remit Finance ARY Exchange Kuwait Asian KIECO Bank Muscat Meethaq Bank Nizwa Global Exchange Hamdan Exchange QIIB Alrajhi Bank Tahweel Alrajhi Remitix Limited (Mukuru) Abu Dhabi Commercial Bank Al Ansari Exchange Lari Exchange GCC Exchange Index Exchange Sharaf Exchange Guavapay Remit Choice IME Ria Transfast U Remit Canada Western Union Aftab Currency Exchange Limited Remitly Instant Cash Payoneer Hellopaisa Omnex Sohni Dharti Remittance Program (SDRP) Remittance Program (SDRP) is a point-based loyalty scheme offered through a smartphone application, for our remitters who work abroad and their loved ones in Pakistan through banking channels or exchange companies. This unique App is being made available for the first time in both English and Urdu languages. It allows users to register as a Remitter and earn points on sending remittances to Pakistan through approved financial channels. Through this App, remitters can also enroll their beneficiaries and transfer their loyalty points to them. Moreover, registered users would also be able to enjoy exclusive benefits offered by the government. SDRP Details Ways to Send Remittance Cash Over Counter Receive cash payment up to Rs. 1,000,000 from any branch of Meezan Bank without having to open an account. Online Transfer Instant and real time credit to the beneficiary's Meezan Bank account at any branch in Pakistan. Other Banks' Beneficiaries Transfer money to customers of other banks through the Real Time Gross Settlement system (RTGS) . Inter-bank Fund Transfer money to any 1-Link member bank instantly and real-time. Instant credit facility to Mobile Wallets A real-time funds transfer in M-Wallets. Home Remittance Accounts Facilitate the Beneficiaries of Home Remittance You can open three types of Remittance accounts with us Sohni Dharti Remittance Where Your Hard-Earned Remittance Meets Care, Convenience & Compliance Meezan Sohni Dharti Remittance Account (MSDRA) is a Shariah-compliant account that makes sending and receiving money to your loved ones safe, easy, and worry-free. Whether you are a Non-Resident Pakistani sending funds or a beneficiary in Pakistan, Remittance Account (MSDRA) helps ensure your hard-earned money reaches your loved ones with the care, trust, and peace of mind you deserve. Express Current Designed to facilitate the beneficiaries of home remittance The Riba-free Meezan Express Current Account is another addition to the offerings of Meezan Bank. Express Current Account has been designed of home remittance and encourage them to use formal banking channels. Express Savings of home remittance Meezan Express Savings formal banking channels. The biggest advantage of Meezan Express Savings Accounts is it can be opened on the basis of a CNIC only & there is NO WITHHOLDING TAX on cash withdrawals through cheque or ATM. Smart Remittance Wallet Receive Remittance in Your Wallet & Stay Connected with Loved ones Smart Remittance Wallet is a digital transformation for receiving home remittance in fast, secure and convenient manner. Wallet is a unique wallet account with a saving facility. It allows our customers to receive remittance directly in their account and get free air time of PKR 2 against each dollar received. Smart Remittance Wallet also gives good profit rates on savings, with the flexibility to use the money at any time. Get in touch with Home Remittance Team Please Call Phone: +92(21) 38103500 Ext: 2720 - 2894 - 2348 - 71096 - 70727 Email at hru.csd@meezanbank.com MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum!
